macro_drivers: OPR — raises financing cost on capital-intensive infrastructure debt

Electricity tariff revision — direct impact on regulated revenue
red_flags: Dividend yield below 3% — income thesis broken for this sector

Rising OPR making utility yield uncompetitive vs fixed income alternatives
